fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: InvestorPlace has flagged UVXY as one of ten leveraged ETFs specifically designed to lose value, implying a strong bearish outlook for the product. This warning suggests that the underlying volatility index it tracks is likely to underperform or move in a way that erodes the ETF's value over time. Traders considering UVXY should be aware of its inherent decay structure and the potential for significant losses, especially in trending markets.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVIX $UVXY If Iran or anyone dropped a Nuke, this will be at 30 in 3 trading days or less no reverse split, & 300 with a reverse split.
